outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected: Negative GEX (-1.41B monthly) amplifies moves. Spot trapped between Max Pain (605) and Gamma Flip (610.5). Break of 600 support triggers acceleration.
outlook.summary: Spot 607.77 sits in a compression zone between structural support at 600 (RESONANCE) and resistance at 610 (RESONANCE near gamma flip). Monthly GEX deeply negative (-1.41B) indicates dealer short gamma - any directional move will be amplified. All expiries show bearish smirk skew (ratio 1.20-1.33) and elevated PCR (1.07-1.64). Max Pain cluster 600-605 acts as magnet. Breaking 600 support likely triggers cascading delta hedging. Primary thesis: fade resistance at 610-612, watch for breakdown below 600 targeting 590.
